/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,liblat.so -o ../lib/liblat.so CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/babai_near_plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/bkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/cholesky_fact.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/deep_bkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/deep_lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_bkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_deep_bkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_deep_lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_enum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/dual_pot_lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/enum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/hkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/l2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/lattice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/pot_bkz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/pot_enum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/pot_lll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/rhf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lat.dir/src/sl.cpp.o   -L/home/ma-user/modelarts/user-job-dir/liblat/build1/onnxruntime/build/Linux/Release  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ma-user/modelarts/user-job-dir/liblat/build1/onnxruntime/build/Linux/Release -lonnxruntime
